Description

BIO PETACTIVE D-KALTABS CALCIUM TABLETS FOR CATS AND DOGS 84TABS

A nutritional supplement that provides the calcium our pet friends need at every stage of life. As it is for humans, calcium is the most abundant mineral in the animal body. In addition to its role in the formation of bones and teeth, it also has a very important role in blood clotting, joint structure, pulse regulation and restoration of the neural system.

Therefore, it is very important to meet the daily calcium need of our furry friends. Especially during pregnancy and lactation period both the mother and the offspring have an increased need for calcium. Similarly, rapid growth in large breed pets continues until 24 months of age. During this critical period, lack of calcium may cause life-long, irreparable skeletal problems.

Calcium absorption may decrease for various reasons. Vitamin D is a key player in calcium absorption, and deficiency can lead to decreased calcium absorption. Therefore, let your furry friend run and play around and get plenty of sunlight on sunny days.

D-Kaltabs contains sufficient amount of Vitamin D in addition to calcium and phosphorus.

Feeding Directions: Administer according to the table below. Crush and sprinkle into the dry/wet food or can be given directly. (1 tablet = 1.5 g)

Chicken Formula with Colostrum and Probiotics
products.description:
Purina Pro Plan Puppy Small & Toy - Chicken Formula with Colostrum and Probiotics

Purina Pro Plan Puppy Small & Toy - Chicken Formula with Colostrum and Probiotics is a premium dry dog food expertly crafted to support the healthy growth and development of small and toy breed puppies with an expected adult weight of 1kg to 10kg. Proudly made in Australia, this formula is designed to meet the unique nutritional needs of small and toy puppies, providing complete and balanced nutrition from weaning through their first year of life. Enriched with colostrum and fortified with live probiotics, this food ensures your tiny pup gets the best start for a healthy, happy adulthood.


Key Features and Benefits

  1. Tailored for Small & Toy Breeds: Supports the fast growth of small and toy puppies with a nutrient-dense formula, featuring tiny, bite-sized kibble (approximately 5-7mm) for easy chewing and digestion.
  2. Immune System Support: Enriched with colostrum (0.1%), a natural source of antibodies scientifically proven to support immune response, helping protect your puppy during their vulnerable early months.
  3. Digestive Health: Fortified with guaranteed live probiotics (Bacillus coagulans, minimum 1320 million CFU/kg) to nourish the microbiome, support gut health, and promote overall well-being.
  4. Brain and Vision Development: Contains DHA (minimum 0.1%), an omega-3 fatty acid from fish oil, to support brain and vision development, ensuring your puppy develops a sharp mind and keen eyesight.
  5. Enhanced Immune Defense: Includes scientifically proven antioxidants, such as Vitamin C (70 mg/kg) and Vitamin E (460 IU/kg), to boost immune defense and protect against illness.
  6. Easy Weaning: Designed for easy rehydration of kibble, making the transition from mother’s milk to solid food smoother for puppies during weaning (3-5 weeks).
  7. High-Quality Protein: Features 34% crude protein (35% chicken meal and chicken as the #1 ingredient) to support rapid muscle growth and meet the high energy demands of small and toy breed puppies.
  8. Healthy Skin and Coat: Packed with omega-3 fatty acids (minimum 0.5%) and omega-6 fatty acids (minimum 1.5%) to nourish the skin and promote a shiny, healthy coat.
  9. Strong Bones and Teeth: Provides essential minerals like calcium (minimum 1%) and phosphorus (minimum 0.8%), along with glucosamine (400 mg/kg), to support the development of strong bones and teeth.
  10. Superior Nutrient Absorption: Made with highly digestible, high-quality ingredients like chicken and brewers rice to ensure optimal nutrient absorption for your growing puppy.
  11. No Artificial Additives: Free from artificial colors, flavors, and preservatives, offering a natural and wholesome diet.
  12. Energy for Growth: Delivers a metabolisable energy (ME) of 3.9 kcal/g, providing the energy needed to fuel your puppy’s active lifestyle and growth.

Nutritional Composition

This formula is carefully balanced to meet the needs of small and toy breed puppies:

  1. Crude Protein: 34% (as fed)
  2. Crude Fat: 21% (as fed)
  3. Crude Fibre (Max): 3% (as fed)
  4. Calcium (Ca) (Min): 1% (as fed)
  5. Phosphorus (P) (Min): 0.8% (as fed)
  6. DHA (Min): 0.1% (as fed)
  7. Glucosamine (Min): 400 mg/kg (as fed)
  8. Vitamin C (Min): 70 mg/kg (as fed)
  9. Vitamin E (Min): 460 IU/kg (as fed)
  10. Omega-3 Fatty Acids (Min): 0.5% (as fed)
  11. Omega-6 Fatty Acids (Min): 1.5% (as fed)
  12. Bacillus coagulans (Min): 1320 million CFU/kg
  13. Metabolisable Energy (ME): 3.9 kcal/g

Ingredients

Purina Pro Plan Puppy Small & Toy is made with high-quality, natural ingredients to ensure optimal nutrition:

  1. Primary Protein Sources: Chicken meal and chicken (35%), providing high-quality protein for muscle growth and development.
  2. Carbohydrates and Fibres: Brewers rice, whole grain wheat, oats, and barley for sustained energy and digestive health.
  3. Healthy Fats: Animal fat (source of omega-6 fatty acids) and fish oil (source of DHA and omega-3 fatty acids) for skin, coat, and brain health.
  4. Vitamins and Minerals: Includes calcium, phosphorus, sodium, chloride, potassium, magnesium, zinc, iron, manganese, copper, selenium, iodine, aluminosilicate, and Vitamins A, B, C, D, E, choline, and folic acid to support overall health.
  5. Digestive and Immune Support: Beet pulp for fibre, colostrum (0.1%) for immunity, and dried Bacillus coagulans fermentation product for gut health.
  6. Natural Antioxidants: Ensures long-lasting freshness without artificial preservatives.

Daily Feeding Guide

The following feeding recommendations are tailored to your puppy’s age and expected adult weight (1kg to 10kg). For puppies aged 3-5 weeks, introduce soaked kibble (1 part kibble + 2 parts warm water, up to 60°C) to ease the transition from mother’s milk. Always provide clean, fresh drinking water alongside meals.

  1. Up to 3 Weeks: Mother’s milk only.
  2. 3-5 Weeks (at will): Introduce soaked kibble.
  3. 6 Weeks (3-4 meals, moistened): 50g (1kg), 55g (3kg), 60g (5kg-6kg), 65g (7kg), 70g (8kg), 75g (9kg-10kg).
  4. 3 Months (3 meals): 55g (1kg), 70g (3kg), 85g (5kg), 90g (6kg), 100g (7kg), 105g (8kg), 110g (9kg), 115g (10kg).
  5. 4 Months (3 meals): 60g (1kg), 70g (3kg), 80g (5kg), 90g (6kg), 100g (7kg), 105g (8kg), 115g (9kg), 120g (10kg).
  6. 5 Months (3 meals): 60g (1kg), 65g (3kg), 70g (5kg), 85g (6kg), 100g (7kg), 115g (8kg), 125g (9kg), 140g (10kg).
  7. 6 Months (2 meals): 60g (1kg), 65g (3kg), 70g (5kg), 85g (6kg), 100g (7kg), 115g (8kg), 130g (9kg), 145g (10kg).
  8. 9 Months (2 meals): Adult* (1kg-3kg), 70g (5kg), 85g (6kg), 100g (7kg), 115g (8kg), 130g (9kg), 145g (10kg).
  9. 12 Months (2 meals): Adult* (1kg-10kg).

Transition Guidelines

  1. At 9-12 Months: Transition to Purina Pro Plan Small & Toy Adult formula, depending on your puppy’s expected adult weight and individual growth rate.

Making the Switch to Pro Plan

To ensure a smooth transition and prevent digestive upset, gradually introduce Purina Pro Plan over 7-10 days:

  1. Day 1: 10% Pro Plan + 90% previous food.
  2. Day 3: 30% Pro Plan + 70% previous food.
  3. Day 7: 70% Pro Plan + 30% previous food.
  4. Day 10: 100% Pro Plan.
  5. This gradual transition allows your puppy’s digestive enzymes to adapt to the new ingredients and nutritional content, ensuring proper digestion and minimizing stomach upset.

Feeding Tips

  1. Adjusting Portions: Monitor your puppy’s weight regularly, ensuring their ribs are easily felt and their waist is visible when viewed from above, to maintain an ideal body condition for lifelong health.
  2. Reproduction: This formula provides extra nutrition for reproducing females during gestation and lactation.
  3. Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, out of direct sunlight, to preserve freshness.

Why Choose Purina Pro Plan Puppy Small & Toy?

Purina Pro Plan Puppy Small & Toy - Chicken Formula is specifically designed for the unique needs of small and toy breed puppies, offering a nutrient-dense formula that supports their rapid growth, delicate digestive systems, and developing immune systems. With colostrum, live probiotics, DHA, and high-quality protein, this food provides a strong foundation for your puppy’s health, ensuring they grow into a vibrant, healthy adult dog. Trust Purina Pro Plan for a science-backed, Australian-made solution that prioritizes your small or toy breed puppy’s well-being from the very start.

products.shortDescription: Nex Gard Spectra 30-60 kg
products.description:
NexGard SPECTRA Chewable Tablets for Dogs (30.1–60 kg)

Provide your large dog with complete parasite protection using NexGard SPECTRA Chewable Tablets, a vet-recommended solution designed for dogs weighing between 30.1 and 60 kg. This pack contains 1 chewable tablet, combining two powerful active ingredients—Afoxolaner and Milbemycin Oxime—to offer broad-spectrum protection against fleas, ticks, heartworm, and intestinal worms. Manufactured by Boehringer Ingelheim, NexGard SPECTRA is a trusted choice for pet owners seeking an all-in-one parasite control solution in a convenient, palatable form.

How NexGard SPECTRA Works

NexGard SPECTRA combines two active ingredients to target a wide range of parasites:

  1. Afoxolaner: An isoxazoline-class insecticide and acaricide that targets the nervous system of fleas and ticks. After ingestion, Afoxolaner is absorbed into your dog’s bloodstream. When fleas or ticks bite, they ingest Afoxolaner, which overstimulates their nervous system, causing rapid paralysis and death.
  2. Milbemycin Oxime: A macrocyclic lactone that targets heartworm larvae and intestinal worms by interfering with their nerve transmission, leading to paralysis and death of the parasites.

This dual-action formula ensures:

  1. Flea Control: Kills adult fleas (Ctenocephalides felis and Ctenocephalides canis) before they can lay eggs, breaking the flea life cycle.
  2. Tick Control: Kills ticks (including Dermacentor reticulatus, Ixodes ricinus, and Rhipicephalus sanguineus) within 48 hours, reducing the risk of tick-borne diseases.
  3. Heartworm Prevention: Prevents heartworm disease (Dirofilaria immitis) by eliminating heartworm larvae.
  4. Intestinal Worm Control: Treats and controls roundworms (Toxocara canis, Toxascaris leonina), hookworms (Ancylostoma caninum, Ancylostoma braziliense, Ancylostoma ceylanicum), and whipworms (Trichuris vulpis).
  5. Month-Long Protection: Each tablet provides 30 days of comprehensive parasite protection.

Key Benefits

  1. Broad-Spectrum Parasite Protection: Protects against fleas, ticks, heartworm, and intestinal worms in one convenient tablet.
  2. Fast-Acting Flea and Tick Control: Kills fleas within 8 hours and ticks within 48 hours, providing quick relief from infestations.
  3. Prevents Heartworm Disease: Eliminates heartworm larvae, protecting your dog from this potentially fatal condition.
  4. Controls Intestinal Worms: Treats and controls common intestinal parasites, supporting your dog’s overall health.
  5. Prevents Flea Infestations: Kills fleas before they can lay eggs, helping to prevent re-infestation and keeping your home flea-free.
  6. Reduces Risk of Tick-Borne Diseases: Effective against multiple tick species, lowering the risk of diseases like Lyme disease or babesiosis.
  7. Palatable Chewable Tablet: The beef-flavored chew is highly palatable, making it easy to administer—most dogs will eat it as a treat.
  8. Safe for Large Dogs: Suitable for dogs weighing 30.1–60 kg and at least 8 weeks of age, with a well-established safety profile when used as directed.
  9. Convenient Monthly Dosing: One tablet per month provides consistent, all-in-one protection, simplifying your pet care routine.

Dosage and Administration

NexGard SPECTRA is designed for dogs weighing between 30.1 and 60 kg. The recommended dosage is:

  1. 1 tablet per month for dogs in this weight range.

Administration Instructions:

  1. Offer the tablet directly to your dog as a treat. Most dogs will readily accept the beef-flavored chew.
  2. If your dog does not eat the tablet voluntarily, you can mix it with a small amount of food to ensure they consume the full dose.
  3. Administer the tablet on the same day each month to maintain continuous protection.
  4. Ensure your dog has access to fresh drinking water after administration.

Note: NexGard SPECTRA can be given with or without food. If your dog vomits within 2 hours of administration, re-dose with another tablet. Consult your veterinarian if vomiting persists or if you have concerns about dosing. For heartworm prevention, ensure the tablet is given monthly, ideally starting before mosquito season and continuing year-round in areas where heartworm is endemic.

Indications

NexGard SPECTRA is indicated for:

  1. Treatment and prevention of flea infestations (Ctenocephalides felis and Ctenocephalides canis).
  2. Treatment and control of tick infestations (Dermacentor reticulatus, Ixodes ricinus, Rhipicephalus sanguineus).
  3. Prevention of heartworm disease (Dirofilaria immitis).
  4. Treatment and control of intestinal worms, including roundworms (Toxocara canis, Toxascaris leonina), hookworms (Ancylostoma caninum, Ancylostoma braziliense, Ancylostoma ceylanicum), and whipworms (Trichuris vulpis).
  5. Can be used as part of a treatment strategy for flea allergy dermatitis (FAD) by controlling flea populations.

Safety and Precautions

  1. For Animal Use Only: NexGard SPECTRA is intended for dogs only and should not be used in cats or other animals.
  2. Age and Weight Restrictions: Suitable for dogs at least 8 weeks of age and weighing 30.1–60 kg. Do not use in dogs outside this weight range without consulting your veterinarian.
  3. Pregnancy and Lactation: The safety of NexGard SPECTRA in breeding, pregnant, or lactating dogs has not been fully established. Consult your veterinarian before use in these cases.
  4. Adverse Reactions: In rare cases, dogs may experience side effects such as vomiting, diarrhea, lethargy, or lack of appetite. Neurological signs (e.g., tremors, ataxia, or seizures) have been reported in dogs with a history of seizures or neurological disorders, particularly due to the isoxazoline class (Afoxolaner). If you notice any adverse reactions, discontinue use and contact your veterinarian immediately.
  5. Drug Interactions: NexGard SPECTRA is generally safe to use with other medications, but inform your veterinarian of any other treatments your dog is receiving, especially if they are on medications for neurological conditions or other parasiticides.
  6. Heartworm Testing: Before starting NexGard SPECTRA for heartworm prevention, dogs should be tested for existing heartworm infection. If a dog is already infected, consult your veterinarian for appropriate treatment before beginning this product.
  7. Keep Out of Reach of Children: Store NexGard SPECTRA in a secure location to prevent accidental ingestion by children or other pets.

Storage

  1. Store at room temperature, below 30°C (86°F), in a dry place.
  2. Keep the tablet in its original blister pack until ready to use to protect it from moisture and light.
  3. Dispose of any unused or expired tablets in accordance with local regulations.

products.description:
PURINA PRO PLAN Adult Large Joint & Mobility Chicken Formula Dry Dog Food

Support your large breed adult dog’s active lifestyle with PURINA PRO PLAN Adult Large Joint & Mobility Chicken Formula Dry Dog Food, expertly formulated for dogs weighing over 50 lbs. Made with high-quality chicken as the #1 ingredient, this nutrient-rich formula delivers 26% protein to maintain lean muscle mass and 12% fat to provide sustained energy. Fortified with guaranteed live probiotics, it supports the pet microbiome, promoting healthy digestion and optimal nutrient absorption for overall vitality. Designed to meet AAFCO Dog Food Nutrient Profiles for adult maintenance, this recipe includes glucosamine and EPA, an omega-3 fatty acid, to support joint health and mobility, helping your dog stay agile and active.

Tailored for large breed adults, this formula features omega-6 fatty acids and vitamin A to nourish skin and coat, ensuring a healthy, glossy appearance. Calcium, phosphorus, and other essential minerals maintain strong bones and teeth, while antioxidants bolster immune health. The highly digestible kibble, free from artificial colors or flavors, ensures maximum nutrient delivery, making it ideal for large dogs with active lifestyles or those needing joint support. Backed by Purina’s nutritional research, this formula provides complete and balanced nutrition to keep your dog thriving.


Key Benefits:

  1. Premium Protein: Real chicken provides 26% protein for strong muscles and energy.
  2. Joint & Mobility Support: Glucosamine and EPA (omega-3 fatty acid) promote healthy joints and mobility.
  3. Gut Health: Live probiotics support the microbiome, enhancing digestion and nutrient absorption.
  4. Strong Bones & Teeth: Calcium, phosphorus, and minerals maintain skeletal health.
  5. Healthy Skin & Coat: Omega-6 fatty acids and vitamin A ensure a shiny coat.
  6. Immune Support: Antioxidants strengthen the immune system.
  7. Made in Australia: Crafted in Purina facilities with strict quality standards

Guaranteed Analysis (Minimums unless stated):

  1. Crude Protein: 26.0%
  2. Crude Fat: 12.0%
  3. Crude Fiber (Max): 5.5%
  4. Moisture (Max): 12.0%
  5. Linoleic Acid: 1.5%
  6. EPA: 0.15%
  7. Calcium: 1.0%
  8. Phosphorus: 0.8%
  9. Vitamin A: 14,000 IU/kg
  10. Vitamin E: 500 IU/kg
  11. Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C): 70 mg/kg
  12. Omega-6 Fatty Acids: 1.6%
  13. Glucosamine: 500 ppm
  14. Bacillus coagulans: 600 million CFU/lb


Ingredients:Chicken, rice, whole grain wheat, corn gluten meal, poultry by-product meal (source of glucosamine), whole grain corn, beef fat preserved with mixed-tocopherols, fish meal, dried egg product, natural flavor, fish oil, mono and dicalcium phosphate, calcium carbonate, salt, potassium chloride, soybean oil, choline chloride, vitamins [Vitamin E supplement, niacin (Vitamin B-3), Vitamin A supplement, calcium pantothenate (Vitamin B-5), thiamine mononitrate (Vitamin B-1), Vitamin B-12 supplement, riboflavin supplement (Vitamin B-2), pyridoxine hydrochloride (Vitamin B-6), folic acid (Vitamin B-9), menadione sodium bisulfite complex (Vitamin K), Vitamin D-3 supplement, biotin (Vitamin B-7)], minerals [zinc sulfate, ferrous sulfate, manganese sulfate, copper sulfate, calcium iodate, sodium selenite], dried Bacillus coagulans fermentation product, garlic oil.

Feeding Instructions:Use a standard 8 oz/250 ml measuring cup (approx. 104g of Pro Plan). Feed according to your dog’s weight, activity level, and body condition, typically once or twice daily. Adjust portions to maintain ideal weight, as large breeds can be prone to obesity, which may stress joints. Transition gradually over 7–10 days to avoid digestive upset. Provide fresh water daily and consult a veterinarian for personalized feeding plans, especially for dogs with joint or mobility concerns.

Customer Insights:Pet owners praise this formula for improving mobility in large breed dogs, with many noting increased energy and ease of movement. The probiotics are valued for supporting digestion, resulting in firmer stools and fewer tummy issues. Some concerns exist about menadione (synthetic Vitamin K) and garlic oil, which may pose risks in rare cases. Consult your veterinarian before switching, particularly for dogs with sensitivities or health conditions.

PURINA PRO PLAN Adult Large Joint & Mobility Chicken Formula Dry Dog Food is a trusted choice for large breed owners, delivering science-backed nutrition to support joint health and overall wellness. Visit www.purina.com.au for more details.

Discover more pet cleaning products

How to use:

Make sure you select a tray that is suitable for the size of your cat and fill it to a depth of 5cm. We recommend that you top up your litter tray every 1-2 days to maintain depth. Check your tray daily removing any clumps or solids, bag and dispose of in the non-recyclable household waste. Shake the tray to bring fresh litter to the surface and top up to maintain effectiveness.

Clean regularly:

We recommend that you replace that cat litter at least every 2 weeks. When cleaning the tray, use a cat-safe cleaning product and ensure that the tray is completely dry before refilling.

Wear Gloves:

Wear gloves when handling soiled cat litter and wash hands thoroughly after disposal.

Avoid inhalation

Avoid inhalation when handling cat litter. It is low dust however dust may be created when handling.

Store in a cool dry place. Nursing and pregnant women should avoid contact with used litter and trays, as should babies and young children

products.description: Puppies experience their most rapid period of development during their first years of age. This includes their activities and learning a new challenge. Complete and balanced nutrition is essential for their proper growth and healthy development. Smart Heart puppy food is formulated to meet puppies nutritional requirements using the nutrient ingredients and supplemented with fish oil (rich in DHA and Omega-3 fatty acid) and Lecithin (rich in Choline) to help enhance brain development, nervous system function and heart health.

products.title: Smart Heart - Power Pack - Adult 10 kg
products.shortDescription: Smart Heart - Power Pack - Adult 10 kg
products.description:
Power your dog’s active lifestyle with our high protein recipe featuring real chicken in an irresistibly crunchy kibble that also cleans their teeth. This wholesome dog food has no added sugar, artificial flavors. SmartHeart Power Pack Dog Food has 100% complete and balanced nutrition and is enriched with omega-6 fatty acids and zinc to keep their skin and coat looking and feeling their best. Adult Dogs and every active dog in between go crazy for the mouthwatering taste of SmartHeart Power Pack High Protein Adult Dry Dog Food. So, bring out the good in your dog with SmartHeart, and feed the goodness of real ingredients.

  1. Provide High Energy – For active/energetic dogs & puppies
  2. L- Carnitine – Maintain dog’s lean muscle mass
  3. Strong Bones and Teeth – High Calcium and Phosphorus
  4. Complete and Well-balanced Nutrition – Promote healthy body functions
  5. Build Muscle Mass – Contain Protein to build and maintain good muscle mass
  6. Healthy Skin and Shiny Coat – Balanced Omega 6 fatty acids
  7. Stronger Immune System – Supplement of Vitamin E and Selenium
  8. Healthy Digestions – Rice is the carbohydrate source that good for digestive function
  9. Boost Up Body Power and Conserve Muscle Mass – Carbohydrate, Protein and Fat to boost performance

Nutritional composition

Crude Protein – min 30%

Crude Fat – min 20%

Crude Fibre – max 3.5%

Moisture – max 10%

Ingredients:

Rice, Poultry meal, Chicken oil, Soybean meal, Corn Gluten meal, Full Fat Soybean, Minerals, Brewer’s Dried Yeast, Vitamins, Antioxidants & L-Carnitine.
